problem id: 402ea488
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(3) XOR SHR(7)) AND ROT(5)

examples:
  00000100 -> 00000000
  11011111 -> 11111001
  11111001 -> 00001001
  10111111 -> 11110001
  10100001 -> 00000000
  01001101 -> 00101000
  10110010 -> 00010000
  11111010 -> 01010001
  01010101 -> 10101000

query: 10001011
predicted answer: 01010001
